disclaimer.banner: This tool is for informational purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult your healthcare provider.
disclaimer.results: These results are AI-generated explanations and should not replace professional medical advice. Please consult your doctor for medical decisions.

landing.heroSubtitleLine1: Upload your results, get clear explanations in minutes.
landing.heroSubtitleLine2: We store absolutely nothing — your health data never touches our servers.
landing.heroPrivacyLine: No account. No storage. No exceptions.
landing.step1Description: Snap a photo of your blood test or type in your values. Both work.
landing.step2Description: Our AI cross-references your results against medical ranges for your age and gender.
landing.step3Description: Get plain-language explanations for every marker — what's normal, what's not, and why it matters.
landing.privacyTitle: We Don't Store Your Data. Period.
landing.privacySubtitle: Most health apps collect everything. We collect nothing. Your blood test data is analyzed in real-time and immediately discarded. No database. No logs. No trace.
landing.privacyNoAccountDesc: Just open the app and go. We don't want your email, your name, or anything else.
landing.privacyNoStorageDesc: Your results live only in your browser tab. Close the tab, and it's gone forever. We never save a single byte of your health data.
landing.privacySecureDesc: Your data travels encrypted to our AI, gets analyzed, and is immediately destroyed. Nothing is logged, cached, or stored anywhere.
landing.privacyPromiseDesc: We built this tool for people who are tired of giving away their health data. Your privacy isn't a feature — it's our entire architecture.
landing.faq1Q: Is this a replacement for my doctor?
landing.faq1A: No. This tool provides educational explanations of blood test markers. It is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult your healthcare provider for medical decisions.
landing.faq2A: We support most standard blood tests including Complete Blood Count (CBC), Basic and Comprehensive Metabolic Panels, Lipid Panels, Thyroid Function Tests, and more.
landing.faq3Q: Is my data really not stored anywhere?
landing.faq3A: Really. Your blood test data is sent to our AI for analysis and immediately discarded. Results only exist in your browser. We have no database for health data — it's architecturally impossible for us to store it.
landing.faq4A: Our AI provides explanations based on standard medical reference ranges and is personalized for your age and gender. However, individual health conditions may affect interpretation, so always verify with your doctor.

analyze.title: Analyze Your Blood Test
analyze.subtitle: Upload an image or enter your values manually to get AI-powered explanations.
analyze.uploadDescription: Drag and drop or click to upload an image or PDF of your blood test results.
analyze.uploadFormats: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF (max 10MB)
analyze.manualDescription: Add your blood test markers and their values below.
analyze.validationTitle: Please fix the following to continue:
analyze.validationFile: Upload a blood test image or PDF
analyze.validationMarkers: Enter at least one marker with a name and value
analyze.validationIncomplete: Some markers are missing a name or value
